h880cc3f7g5dc3g41fdgac00ge573d1c961a6: *The campsite is secure. Blood-soaked, but secure.*
hda0439deg0367g470bgac35gafc748bb7dee: Minthara. To sleep with her is to dream of death. Plenty of that to go around.
hde7982beg00a3g4184g92d7gc60f89e528d5: What's done is done - but we should check the corpses for valuables.
h5016fc3fg61e4g4abagac54gc1776a2be33e: Bloodshed by day, bloodshed by night. What a jolly bloody life we lead.
h5d3b2dabgb334g45b2gb5c8g3afc55c94837: First you sow, now you reap. I trust you shall be more selective going forward, lest it's your blood I spill.
h4eb25360g7a35g4157g8048gcf1f47870e46: Leave the corpses be, let the maggots feast. Our betrayers deserve no better.
hc75fd348g8716g45begb4abg6a76b63ee063: Talk about having your cake then killing it. I hope all your romantic liaisons don't end this way.
hd9b0b370gc30ag49a5gaf2eg59ff35d47c45: That's one way to end a party. Let's mop up the goblin leftovers and get some rest.
h4effe605g56f9g4ac0g9475g702f60dd86f7: Well. I hope your romp was worth it.
h3e123e77g1c39g45a5ga708g2b2f646444a7: What a party. We should do this again.
